allow: Bash("F:\\IDLCFinanceTakeHome\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "from app.schemas import NIDData, GeminiNIDExtraction, ErrorResponse; from app import config; print\(NIDData\(nidNumber='123 4567890', dateOfBirth='not-a-date'\).model_dump\(\)\)")

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8000/ -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; "root: $ok"; $d = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs -TimeoutSec 5; "docs: $\($d.StatusCode\)"; $o = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json -TimeoutSec 5; "openapi: $\($o.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8000/ -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; "server up: $ok"; curl.exe -s -w "`nHTTP %{http_code} in %{time_total}s`n" -F "front=@F:\\IDLCFinanceTakeHome\\NID_Images\\Person_1\\Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh_page-0001.jpg" -F "back=@F:\\IDLCFinanceTakeHome\\NID_Images\\Person_1\\Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh_page-0002.jpg" http://127.0.0.1:8000/extract-nid; curl.exe -s -w "`nHTTP %{http_code} in %{time_total}s`n" -F "front=@F:\\IDLCFinanceTakeHome\\NID_Images\\Person_2\\Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh \(1\)_page-0001.jpg" -F "back=@F:\\IDLCFinanceTakeHome\\NID_Images\\Person_2\\Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh \(1\)_page-0002.jpg" http://127.0.0.1:8000/extract-nid)
